name: Jellycat Plush Bunny Toy
description: This is a really soft plush bunny made by Jellycat. It's high quality and super cute, so it works well as a gift for kids or even for people who collect plush toys.

name: Brita Water Filter Pitcher
description: A Brita water filter pitcher that helps make tap water taste better by reducing chlorine and odors. It's useful for everyday drinking water at home.

name: Flower Bouquet
description: A fresh mixed flower bouquet with seasonal flowers. It's arranged nicely and works well for gifts, decorations, or special occasions.

name: Wooden Cutting Board
description: A solid wooden cutting board made from durable hardwood. It's sturdy for everyday cooking and also gentle on knife blades.

name: Soy Sauce Bottle
description: A 10 oz bottle of soy sauce with a rich flavor. It's good for cooking, dipping, or adding extra taste to different dishes.

name: Dragon Playing Card Deck
description: A playing card deck with a dragon themed design. The cards have a nice finish and are good for card games or collecting.

name: Electric Nail Drill
description: A cordless electric nail drill that can be used for filing and shaping nails. It has adjustable speeds, so it's useful for doing manicures at home.

name: Violin
description: A beginner violin that comes with a bow and a case. It's designed for students who are learning how to play.

name: Soccer Ball
description: A size 5 soccer ball that follows the standard size used in official games. It's durable and works for both indoor and outdoor play.

name: Jump Rope
description: A lightweight jump rope with adjustable length. It's good for cardio workouts and general fitness training.
